data.title: X responds to global criticism by restricting Grok image tools to paid users and enhancing safeguards due to misuse.
data.description: X has restricted access to its Grok image tools to only paid users, following increased regulatory scrutiny due to misuse. The company has implemented additional protections to prevent further misuse.

data.title: GIGABYTE unveils local AI solution at CES 2026, emphasizing practical AI TOP utility for local applications.
data.description: In Taipei on January 15, 2026, GIGABYTE showcased a local artificial intelligence solution at CES 2026 as AI transitions from experimental phases to practical use. The GIGABYTE AI TOP suite emphasizes an AI strategy tailored for local operations, aiming to support real-world applications.

data.title: Thesis Gold submits pre-feasibility report for Lawyers-Ranch Project on SEDAR+. (TSXV: TAU) (WKN: A3EP87) (OTCQX: THSGF)
data.description: In Vancouver, BC on January 14, 2026, Thesis Gold Inc. (TSXV: TAU, WKN: A3EP87, OTCQX: THSGF) revealed the submission of the Pre-feasibility Study (referred to as the "2025 PFS") for its Lawyers-Ranch gold-silver Project. The project, entirely owned by Thesis, was detailed in the filing on SEDAR+.

data.title: Bitcoin soared to $97,860 amid Senate crypto vote & Iran tensions. Ethereum $3,330.89, XRP $2.12, Dogecoin $0.1455 dropped. BTC trend continues upwards.
data.description: Bitcoin rose to a 2-month high of $97,860, marking a more than 10% increase for the year. Ethereum remained steady around $3,300 with a 10% increase in trading volume. XRP dropped by 1.89% to $2.12, while Dogecoin fell by 1.84% to $0.1455. Solana increased by 0.18% to $145.81. The upcoming vote on a cryptocurrency bill by the Senate Banking Committee impacted investor sentiment. Shares of companies like Strategy Inc. and Coinbase Global Inc. rose by 3.66% and 1.25% respectively. This information was reported on Benzinga.com.
